join.title: Join the live quiz
join.subtitle: Enter a session code, pick a playful avatar, and keep your personal rejoin code safe.
join.previewFallback: Waiting for a valid session code
join.previewHint: Preview updates as soon as we find the room.
join.noActiveSessions: No active sessions yet. Ask the host to start one.
join.joinAsNewHint: Create a fresh seat in this session.
join.rejoinExistingHint: Use your personal player code to come back as yourself.
join.rejoinNeedsCode: Use the personal code you got when you first joined this room.

play.buzzPlaceholder: Type the answer you want the host to review
play.waitingTitle: The host is getting the next round ready
play.waitingCopy: Stay on this screen. New questions and score changes appear automatically.
play.boardNoSelector: Waiting for the host to assign a selector
play.catInBagPrompt: Choose a player to answer this question:
play.stakesWaiting: Waiting for other players to wager…
play.stakesYouAnswer: You have the highest wager — answer the question!

leaderboard.subtitle: Scores update live and stay sorted automatically.

display.tvHint: Open this view on a TV or projector to show the question, timer, and live standings.

admin.loginSubtitle: Sign in with an approved host account.
admin.registerSubtitle: The first registered user becomes the main admin. Later registrations wait for approval.
admin.registerPendingMessage: Registration sent. An admin needs to approve this account before it can sign in.
admin.autoTimerHint: Host timers control how long players answer and how long before the next step. You can pause or skip ahead at any time.
admin.noSessionSelected: Create or select a session to begin live control.
admin.copyFailed: Could not copy the display link
admin.awaitingAttempt: Waiting for the player's answer attempt.
admin.boardControlHint: You can pick a tile yourself or leave question choice to the assigned player.
admin.noSelector: No player assigned — click Assign to pick who selects next
admin.catInBagAssignHint: Pick the player who should receive this Cat in the Bag question.
admin.passwordOptional: Leave blank to keep current password

editor.authRequired: Admin login is required to edit quizzes.
editor.classicModeHint: Standard question flow with everyone answering together.
editor.buzzModeHint: Players buzz in first, then the host reviews the attempt.
editor.autosaveHint: Every change is saved automatically. No save button needed.
editor.question: Question
editor.promptHint: Write the main question exactly how players should see it.
editor.helpHint: Optional extra context or a nudge for the host.
editor.helpPlaceholder: Add a hint, category, or host note
editor.typeHint: Choose whether players pick from options or type an answer.
editor.multipleChoiceHint: Show answer choices and mark the correct one.
editor.textInputHint: Players type a free-form answer for review.
editor.textAnswerHint: Set the answer text the host should look for.
editor.optionsHint: Build the choices, then tap the correct one.
editor.scoringHint: Timer is hidden here now, but points and penalty stay editable.
editor.mediaHint: Pick a media type, then paste a link or upload a file.
editor.mediaNoneHint: No media attached to this question.
editor.mediaImageHint: Attach a picture players should see.
editor.mediaAudioHint: Attach an audio clip to play.
editor.mediaVideoHint: Attach a video clip to show.
editor.mediaSourceHint: Upload a file or paste a direct URL. Max size:
editor.pinHint: Set a PIN to protect editing, exporting, and host controls for this quiz. Leave it blank to remove protection.
editor.pinPrompt: Enter the quiz PIN to open or manage this protected quiz.
editor.sessionPinPrompt: Enter the quiz PIN to control this protected session.
editor.boardBuilderHint: Create rounds and columns first, then assign each buzz question from the dropdowns below.
editor.boardAssignHint: Assign this question to a round and column from your board layout.
editor.buzzAnswerLocked: Buzz quizzes always use text answers. Multiple choice stays available for classic mode only.
